alwaysVisible.description: By default, suggestions only render when the active thread has no messages (treating them as an empty-state affordance). Set to true to render the suggestions regardless of message count — e.g. as a "next prompt" row above the composer in an active conversation.

autoSubmit.description: Whether to auto-submit when a suggestion is clicked.

suggestions.description: Suggestion items. Strings are normalized to { value, label }. Ignored when children are provided.
